name: VideoVault Premiere Extension
releaseNotes:
- Compressed the header and first-screen layout further.
- Removed the theme switcher and kept the shipped experience dark-only.
- Improved typography with a stronger display/body font pairing.
- Kept the one-click missing-proxy flow and proxy state logic intact.
- Refined the top header into a simpler structure:
- logo on the left
- primary mode tabs in the header
- compact icon menu button on the right
- Removed the extra title strip below the header so content starts sooner.
- Tightened paddings, margins, card radii, and control heights across the opening states.
- Swapped emoji-style controls out of the panel chrome and kept the header iconography SVG-based.
- Kept the extension on the dark theme only for now.
- Extension version bumped to `1.7.2`.
- Update `extensions/adobe-premiere/latest.json` in `videovault-release-updates` after packaging the new macOS and Windows installers.
- Release tag should follow:
- `premiere-extension-v1.7.2`
